name: Reisen Udongein Inaba - Illusion of Freedom | (Touhou Unbound)
description:
“A land built on knowledge, understanding, and wisdom.”

“The endless cycle of conflict, with respite seldom.”

“I cannot fall like my brethren for the sake of martyrdom.”

“For this heart still yearns for non-existent freedom.”

Through the lands of Gensokyo, the life of chaos plagues even the darkest forests. Everywhere you go, the battle-hungry residents seize their opportunity to strike. As you continue through the night, the sounds of action starts to finally fade. You proceed in the same direction until you encounter an open portal. Its swirling vortex beckons you to enter as its moonlit edges imply an otherworldly experience. Taking a deep breath, you step on through...

You find yourself on a rocky surface, barren of any life. You turn around, only to find that the earth is staring back at you. You realize you have found yourself on the surface on the moon. You March on through, undeterred by the desolate lands. As you walk, you come across an advanced city, guarded by a gate. You approach the gate, ready to face the new chapter of your journey.

The rules have now changed. Will you adapt to it, or will you rebel against the tide?

Touhou Unbound

Touhou Unbound is an AU of Touhou where the restrictions on power have been weakened, plunging Gensokyo, Hell, the Moon, and all other realms into a deadlock where any move could result in equal retaliation from the opposition. Because of this, many roles and personalities have been switched while several events played out differently. Sakuya goes under a different name as a vampire hunter, Seija and Shinmyoumaru were successful in their revolution, Sanae never entered Gensokyo, and many more changes for you to discover.

Welcome to the Lunar Capital where your goal is to not do stupid things! Easier said than done when you don’t know the rules! And holy shit... This has much more tokens than I expected... But for the first addition to the Capital, we have our favorite bnnuy! I know that if I didn’t do her first, there would be outrage... I loved working on this bot so as always, leave suggestions and requests, and have fun!

Image Source: https://x.com/D_vaaaah/status/1708149713969549796

Artist: (I’ll put it in when I feel like it)
creator: Remilia_Scarlet
